text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having been invited to a Mejiro family
get-together, I arrive with Mejiro Dober.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks busy exchanging pleasantries with all
her relatives, so I decide to indulge in some
refreshments alone.
Dober?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What? ...You can't be serious?! Wait, wait, when
did you get here?! Wooow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've never heard her let out such a joyous cry
before. Just as I'm about to ask what's
happened...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Dober's over the moon! You don't see that every
day!
choice_data_list: You sure don't. Who's the lady with her?
You sure don't. Who's the lady with her?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You might have heard about her already, but
she's like a second mother to Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Right after Dober was born, her mother entered a
really busy period in her modeling career...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That lady over there took care of Dober
whenever her mother was away. I hear that she
often used to take Dober out on fun trips.

text_block_list.name: Young Dober
text_block_list.text: Auntie! This food is really scrumptious!

text_block_list.name: Dober's Aunt
text_block_list.text:
Didn't I tell you? The food here is the best! I used
to come here with your mother fairly often.

text_block_list.name: Dober's Aunt
text_block_list.text:
We'd always eat way too much, and then go for a
run together! It was like a little custom we had!

text_block_list.name: Young Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Mother did that? Then I want to run with you,
too, Auntie!

text_block_list.name: Dober's Aunt
text_block_list.text:
That sounds fun. But you have to finish all of your
lunch first!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
...That's pretty much how they were. Dober's
really attached to her, since they were always so
close.
choice_data_list: I should probably leave them to it.
I should probably leave them to it.

text_block_list.name: Dober's Aunt
text_block_list.text: It's good to see you again, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Geez, you should have told me you were
attending. I would have dressed more nicely!

text_block_list.name: Dober's Aunt
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I think you look plenty cute as you are.
How have you been lately? I want to hear all
about your academy life!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Of course! Well, you see...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I may have told you this before, but my
roommate is from America!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
She's cheerful and daring, but you can't leave her
alone for too long, as she's always stirring up
some kind of trouble.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
On one occasion, she invited me to a barbecue
but was so fixated on the meat that she forgot to
bring any coals to cook with.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
We had to run to the store to buy some. She's
always got me dashing about on crazy errands
like that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Although I won't deny that it can be quite fun.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What else...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Um, there's a person who really cares a lot for me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
This person always works really late and never
listens when I tell them to rest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
And even when they're exhausted, they worry
about me instead. A bit of a weirdo, right? Still...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It's thanks to this person that I have peace of
mind about certain things...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
M-moving on! The academy is really great, and
every day is a blast!

text_block_list.name: Dober's Aunt
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it certainly sounds that way. I can see the
sparkle in your eyes as you talk about it. You're
just as cute as when you were a child.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... Well, what do you expect? I'm always
delighted when we get the chance to talk.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...Um, Trainer? I have a favor to ask.
choice_data_list: I didn't see any of that. Right?
I didn't see any of that. Right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Heh! Didn't expect any less from Dober's trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I make my promise, the festivities end, and we
head home...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hey, did something good happen? You've got a
goofy look on your face.
choice_data_list: The, uh, food was just so delicious!
The, uh, food was just so delicious!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hey, how come you look so happy? Did
something good happen?
choice_data_list: The, uh, food was just so delicious!
The, uh, food was just so delicious!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Of all the things to get excited about...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, I see. I hope you filled your belly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But what else did you expect? The Mejiro family
cooks are on par with those of high-class
restaurants.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
The family cooks are on a whole different level
from what you'd get elsewhere.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: More importantly... I'm rather impressed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: More importantly... I'm rather impressed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Despite being among all those famous Mejiro
folk, your appetite still managed to overpower
your nerves. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober thinks I'm a glutton now, but at
least I managed to keep my promise to Mejiro
Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hm? I didn't ask whether you saw anything...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hm? I didn't ask whether you saw anything...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Wait. I-It couldn't be... You mean you saw....

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, it's nothing! Forget it! If you saw nothing,
then it's fine. This conversation is over!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel a slight pang of guilt, but at least I
managed to keep my promise to Mejiro Ryan.
